text:
Tesla AI chip design engineering reviews  are so great! Team is awesome.

Our AI6 chip might set a record for most amount of usable intelligence from a wafer when factoring in yield.
summary: Tesla AI chip design engineering reviews are so great! Team is awesome. Our AI6 chip might set a record for most amount of usable intelligence from a wafer when factoring in yield.
ai_summary: Elon Musk highlights Tesla's progress on the AI6 chip design, emphasizing the engineering team's quality and the chip's potential to achieve record efficiency in usable intelligence per wafer yield. The post demonstrates Tesla's advancement in developing custom AI chips for autonomous driving and neural network processing, representing a critical vertical integration strategy to reduce dependency on external semiconductor suppliers and improve performance-per-watt economics for AI inference at scale.
embed_html:
Tesla AI chip design engineering reviews are so great! Team is awesome.

Our AI6 chip might set a record for most amount of usable intelligence from a wafer when factoring in yield.

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 9, 2026
